channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister insists Labour will not apply national living wage to all over-18s before election – UK politics live
item.description: Minister insists Labour will not apply national living wage to all over-18s before election – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham
item.description: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: On this, one crazy stat from Amy’s and my piece is that NINE of Rupert Lowe’s X posts have had (vastly) more views than Starmer’s single most viewed post (a statement on Iran war) since Feb.
9! He’s a fringe oppositi...
item.description:
On this, one crazy stat from Amy’s and my piece is that NINE of Rupert Lowe’s X posts have had (vastly) more views than Starmer’s single most viewed post (a statement on Iran war) since Feb.
9! He’s a fringe oppositi...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Minister refuses to say when long-delayed defence investment plan will be published
item.description: Minister refuses to say when long-delayed defence investment plan will be published

item.title: Byline Times: Keir Starmer's Government Allows UK's Biggest Polluter to Power AI by Burning Wood
item.description: Keir Starmer's Government Allows UK's Biggest Polluter to Power AI by Burning Wood

item.title: ConservativeHome: You shuffle if you want to, but the 'lady' isn't dealing right now
item.description: You shuffle if you want to, but the 'lady' isn't dealing right now

item.title: i Politics: ‘Don’t come back for PIP’: Mutinous Labour left warn Starmer over welfare cuts
item.description: ‘Don’t come back for PIP’: Mutinous Labour left warn Starmer over welfare cuts

item.title: i Politics: UK plan to punish Putin's shadow ships for undersea attacks
item.description: UK plan to punish Putin's shadow ships for undersea attacks
